samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divide a 16-bit number by an 8-bit number in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Extracts the higher bits of the dividend, compares them with the divisor, sets the quotient based on the comparison, and concatenates the remainder with the highest remaining 1-bit of the dividend.</implementation>
</module>
